header.title: Profile Settings
header.description: Manage your account settings and preferences

avatar.requirements: JPG, GIF or PNG. Max size of 2MB.

password.title: Password
password.description: Update your password regularly to keep your account secure

verification.description: Verify your account to access all features

subscription.title: Subscription

error.title: Error Loading Profile
error.default: Failed to load profile data. Please try again later.

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
